hero.title: What is Cisco DNA Center?
hero.subtitle: Central management and orchestration platform for modern enterprise networks
hero.description: Cisco DNA Center unifies device inventory, policy, automation, and assurance so network teams can operate with intent-based accuracy and speed.

sops.title: Pass VRF / Virtual Networks
steps: Check underlay routing and L3 connectivity
Create Virtual Network in Design settings
Assign VRF, VLAN and VNID mapping
